title: New Double Bifurcation of Nilpotent Focus
author_string: Li, Feng, Li, Hongwei, Liu, Yuanyuan
journal: International Journal of Bifurcation and Chaos
publisher: World Scientific Pub Co Pte Ltd
abstract: In this paper, a new bifurcation phenomenon of nilpotent singular point is analyzed. A nilpotent focus or center of the planar systems with 3-multiplicity can be broken into two complex singular points and a second order elementary weak focus. Then, two more limit cycles enclosing the second order elementary weak focus can bifurcate through the multiple Hopf bifurcation.
